caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt is speaking into a professional microphone in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. His shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" in a mix of white and orange letters. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white t-shirt, and racks of clothing are visible alongside framed pictures on the wall. Two logos are present on the screen: a circular black logo on the left and a red logo on the right that reads "ROCKY FLY TOT". As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expressions shift from a wide, open-mouthed laugh to a more composed expression while continuing to speak, with slight changes in his head position and gaze.
